{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321134226CD67684B9D72B1DB0190"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618902634689086232","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这部《穿越大清，朱崇文》简直是为历史考据党和反套路读者量身打造的佳作！

首先，“无系统”的设定是一股清流。在这个金手指泛滥的时代，作者敢于让主角程宇俊凭借自身的智慧、对历史的洞察以及现代人的思维去破局，这种“硬核”穿越让每一次化险为夷都显得真实可信，读起来热血沸腾而非依赖数据堆砌。

其次，身份设定的张力拉满。主角穿越成明太祖朱元璋第十六子岷王朱楩的十二世孙，这个身份在清朝初年极具戏剧性——既是前朝皇室血脉，又是流落民间的遗珠。特别是父母流亡四川南充这一背景，不仅巧妙地将故事锚定在具体的历史地理坐标（正好与您所在的地点呼应），更为主角增添了浓厚的家国悲情与复国（或生存）的紧迫感。从大明宗室到大清治下的平民，这种巨大的身份落差为剧情提供了无限的探索空间。

整部作品结构清晰，人物刻画有血有肉，没有无脑爽文的浮躁，只有步步为营的智斗和波澜壮阔的历史画卷。对于喜欢明末清初历史、想要看主角如何在乱世中凭真本事杀出一条血路的书友来说，这绝对是一部不容错过的“超好看”神作！五星推荐！","text_exts":[{"e":168,"s":165,"text":"朱元璋","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9C%B1%E5%85%83%E7%92%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774071746B1DB0190%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227618902634689086232%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227580759605471349784%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9C%B1%E5%85%83%E7%92%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773916444,"group_id":"7580759605471349784","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我想成为番茄作家协会","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwA4bCNIJFs0pF8ZsLi+lsQ=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4438a23a823d4401bbcd1254dd2fedf1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616006&x-signature=2fYI%2FyLn1BVedjuBGnXkEv3m9ps%3D","user_id":"433665898197835","user_name":"梁远胜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"433665898197835","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7580759605471349784","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越大清，成为明室后裔朱崇文。

此时，剃发易服令下，汉家衣冠蒙尘，九州山河破碎。
面对清廷铁骑，他毅然披上尘封的大明红色龙袍！

"既然这世道无公理，那朕便用手中的剑，劈出一个新大明！"

携手猛将梁龙，聚义兵，抗清廷，复华夏。
从江南起兵到北伐中原，从重整军备到万国来朝。

朝堂之上，群臣山呼万岁：

"朱崇文陛下，天命归您！"
"愿新大明如巨龙苏醒，太平富强震烁古今！"
"您以雷霆手段重建皇图，扫平六合，让万国俯首称臣！"

从此天下再无战火，只有铁蹄踏出的盛世狂歌；
万民再无疾苦，唯有沐浴皇恩的激昂呐喊。

山河姓朱，日月同辉。
大明万岁！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o3aadb8fbd47dcd0b2948340306a0162d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"梁远胜","author_id":"","book_id":"7580759605471349784","book_name":"穿越大清，朱崇文","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":126,"name":"明朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=126&name=明朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7617304544191463960","read_count":"10","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"189614"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"32","tags":"历史古代,明朝,争霸,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o3aadb8fbd47dcd0b2948340306a0162d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255746&x-signature=u34CgEjDMAI8g%2FVTxx0PhO55pG0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"433665898197835","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"99"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321134226CD67684B9D72B1DB0190"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":11766,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":11},"user_action":{"author":1,"author_digg_time":1773916456,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_
